infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Roots reads your contacts to help identify the people who matter most to you.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Roots uses your location to show your position on the Globe screen.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Roots uses your camera to capture photos for memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Roots accesses your photo library so you can add photos to memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Roots saves photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Roots may use the microphone if you record video for a memory.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Roots reads your calendar to detect shared events with connections.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Roots uses your location for the Globe screen.

plugins.contactsPermission: Roots reads contacts to find people who matter to you.
